VasPushData - Class in com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration
This is used to communicate with POS Service to configure the parameters of Google SmartTap to push data from terminal to mobile, such as merchant info.
Cross compatible with Semi and Full Integration BroadPOS apps
VasPushData() - Constructor for class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.VasPushData
 
vasPushData(Context, VasPushData.VasPushDataRequest, CommSetting) - Static method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.VasPushData
This is a wrapper to use PosLink to do communication with ManageRequest.TransType = 36, VASPUSHDATA.
VasPushData.GoogleSmartTapPushService - Class in com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration
 
VasPushData.GoogleSmartTapPushService.NewService - Class in com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration
 
VasPushData.GoogleSmartTapPushService.ServiceUpdate - Class in com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration
 
VasPushData.GoogleSmartTapPushService.ServiceUsage - Class in com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration
 
VasPushData.VasPushDataRequest - Class in com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration
 
VasPushData.VasPushDataResponse - Class in com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration

VasPushDataResponse() - Constructor for class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.VasPushData.VasPushDataResponse

Response VAS Information

VasSetMerchantParameters - Class in com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration
This is used to communicate with POS Service to configure the parameters of Apple VAS or Google SmartTap.
Cross compatible with Semi and Full Integration BroadPOS apps
VasSetMerchantParameters() - Constructor for class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.VasSetMerchantParameters
 
vasSetMerchantParameters(Context, VasSetMerchantParameters.VasSetMerchantParametersRequest, CommSetting) - Static method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.VasSetMerchantParameters
This is a wrapper to use PosLink to do communication with ManageRequest.TransType = 35, VASSETMERCHANTPARAMETERS.
VasSetMerchantParameters.ApplePayVAS - Class in com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration
 
VasSetMerchantParameters.GoogleSmartTap - Class in com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration
 
VasSetMerchantParameters.VasSetMerchantParametersRequest - Class in com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration
 
VasSetMerchantParameters.VasSetMerchantParametersResponse - Class in com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration

VehicleNumber - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.FleetCard
Deprecated.
Also called “Vehicle Card Number”, “Purchase Device Sequence Number”, “Purchase Dev Seq”, or “PDSN”.
